member.name: T:Elevate.Data.ElevateDatabase
member.summary: Central SQLite database service for the Elevate app. Initialised once via MauiProgram and injected as a singleton. All data is user-scoped: every record stores the UserId of its owner.

member.name: M:Elevate.Data.ElevateDatabase.InitAsync
member.summary: Creates all tables. No seed data — users enter their own.

member.name: M:Elevate.Data.ElevateDatabase.GetLatestLikesAsync
member.summary: Returns the most recently logged Likes achievement for the current user.

member.name: M:Elevate.Data.ElevateDatabase.GetPreviousLikesAsync
member.summary: Returns the second-most-recently logged Likes achievement (used for delta calculation).

member.name: M:Elevate.Data.ElevateDatabase.GetGoalsAsync
member.summary: Returns only user-created (non-milestone) goals.

member.name: M:Elevate.Data.ElevateDatabase.GetMilestonesAsync
member.summary: Returns only preset milestone records for the current user.

member.name: M:Elevate.Data.ElevateDatabase.SeedMilestonesAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Seeds the standard follower and likes milestones for a user the first time they log in. Safe to call multiple times — skips if already seeded.

member.name: M:Elevate.Data.ElevateDatabase.CheckAndUnlockMilestonesAsync(System.String,System.Double)
member.summary: Called every time a follower or likes value is logged. Updates CurrentValue on all matching milestones, unlocks any that have crossed their threshold for the first time, and fires an alert. Returns the list of newly unlocked milestones.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.Achievement.UserId
member.summary: Owner of this record.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.Achievement.MetricValue
member.summary: The numeric value the creator wants to log alongside this achievement. Examples: follower count reached, number of views, revenue amount, etc. It's whatever number best represents "how big" this win is.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.Achievement.IconEmoji
member.summary: Category icon emoji (e.g. "👥", "📹", "📺").

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.Achievement.IsDraft
member.summary: Whether this achievement is a draft or fully saved.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.ContentItem.ContentType
member.summary: "Video" or "Livestream"

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.CreatorGoal.Unit
member.summary: e.g. "followers", "likes"

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.CreatorGoal.AccentColor
member.summary: Accent colour hex shown on the gauge.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.CreatorGoal.IsMilestone
member.summary: True = this is a preset system milestone (seeded on first login). False = user-created custom goal.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.CreatorGoal.IsUnlocked
member.summary: For milestones: has the user's logged value crossed TargetValue yet? Always false for custom goals (they use Progress instead).

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.CreatorGoal.MilestoneBadge
member.summary: Emoji badge shown on the milestone card.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.FollowerSnapshot.DailyGain
member.summary: Net new followers gained on this day.

member.name: T:Elevate.Data.Models.UserAccount
member.summary: Represents a registered user account. Maps to the "UserAccounts" table in the SQLite database.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.UserAccount.PasswordHash
member.summary: BCrypt hash of the password.

member.name: P:Elevate.Data.Models.UserAccount.SettingsJson
member.summary: Simple settings flags stored as JSON string.

member.name: T:Elevate.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
